name: skillwiki
description: Project-aware Karpathy-style knowledge base for Codex with 18 prompt-only skills backed by the deterministic skillwiki CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Project-aware wiki skills for Codex agents
interface.longDescription: 18 prompt-only skills (wiki-*, proj-*, using-skillwiki) for deterministic, project-aware knowledge workflows.
defaultPrompt: Initialize a project wiki and schema for this repository.
Ingest this PRD and produce typed knowledge pages with provenance.
Run a vault lint pass and summarize the highest priority fixes.
